organization.fullName: Meshalkin Research Institute of Pathology of Circulation

identificationModule.briefTitle: Continuous Rhythm Monitoring in Patients After Acute Myocardial infaRction andpREServed Lef venTricle Ejection Fraction (ARREST)
identificationModule.officialTitle: Continuous Rhythm Monitoring in Patients After Acute Myocardial infaRction and pREServed Left venTricle Ejection Fraction

leadSponsor.name: Meshalkin Research Institute of Pathology of Circulation

collaborators.name: Medtronic Cardiac Rhythm and Heart Failure

descriptionModule.briefSummary: The trial will inform whether detection of ventricular arrhythmias by means of implantable loop recorder (ILR) can help to predict SCD in the large population of survivors of a myocardial infarction with preserved left ventricular function, EF\>40%. This may improve risk stratification in these patients, and can inform on the clinical use of subcutaneous monitors to identify post-infarction populations in need for an intervention to prevent sudden death.

armGroups.label: Group 1
armGroups.description: Patients with documented myocardial infarction in the 7days prior to enrolment and left ventricular ejection fraction \>=40% as assessed by echocardiography within 7 days window after MI,who are not candidate to ICD/CRT/IPG implantation after PCI undergo ILR implantation

primaryOutcomes.measure: Sustained, nonsustained, symptomatic, asymptomatic ventricular tachycardias
Documented Arrhythmic death without evidence of primary non cardiac cause

secondaryOutcomes.measure: All Arrhythmic events recorded by ILR
Changing in treatment strategy, based on physician decision
Changing in medical treatment (anticoagulation, antiarrhythmic drugs)

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria

* Informed consent signed
* Documented myocardial infarction in the 7days prior to enrolment
* Age \> 18 yrs
* Left ventricular ejection fraction \>=40% as assessed by echocardiography within 7 days window after MI.

Exclusion Criteria

* subject is unwilling or unable to comply with the study procedures
* documented ventricular tachycardia or survived cardiac arrest outside of an acute coronary syndrome
* Subject has indications for active implanted cardiac medical device (IPG, ICD, CRT).
* contraindications for implantation of a ICM - Planned CABG procedure

locations.facility: State Research Institute of CIrculation Pathology Novosibirsk, Russian Federation

references.citation: Romanov A, Martinek M, Purerfellner H, Chen S, De Melis M, Grazhdankin I, Ponomarev D, Losik D, Strelnikov A, Shabanov V, Karaskov A, Pokushalov E. Incidence of atrial fibrillation detected by continuous rhythm monitoring after acute myocardial infarction in patients with preserved left ventricular ejection fraction: results of the ARREST study. Europace. 2018 Feb 1;20(2):263-270. doi: 10.1093/europace/euw344.
